CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-02-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-10-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as the order of the Court: Plaintiff Long Beach Mortgage Company's Motion for Summary Judgment was ordered off calendar. Notice of settlement filed by plaintiff on May 3, 2002. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
